# @json-express/seeder-faker — AI Context

Fake-data seeder built on @faker-js/faker. Fills collections with realistic data derived from model field types — relation-aware (parents seeded before children, FKs wired).

## Install
```
npm i @json-express/seeder-faker
```
Discovery is automatic; seeding runs only when the server starts with a flag:
```
npx json-express --seed          # seed empty collections
npx json-express --seed-append   # force-append another batch
```
**Never import it or write seed scripts.**

## Configuration (.env / jex.config — case-insensitive)
`jex.faker.collections.<name>.*` — per-collection overrides (count, explicit generator hints); collections listed here are created even without a data file or model.

## What it unlocks
- Zero-config demo data: field names/types drive realistic values (emails, names, dates).
- Foundation of `@json-express/preset-mock-server`.
